rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-none text-white
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-white
rules.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#D4AF37] font-semibold

surface_styles.solid_card: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] rounded-none hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors duration-500

navbar.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300
navbar.links: text-sm tracking-widest uppercase text-white hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors

hero.layout: min-h-screen relative flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/60 to-[#0A0A0A] z-10
hero.content: relative z-20 text-center flex flex-col items-center gap-6 mt-20

floating_booking_bar.layout: absolute bottom-10 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-30 w-[90%] max-w-5xl
floating_booking_bar.style: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 border border-white/10 p-4 md:p-6 rounded-none flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 items-center justify-between
floating_booking_bar.inputs: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-0 rounded-none w-full

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold hover:bg-[#FDE047] transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] px-8 py-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black transition-all duration-300

2d_floor_booking.room_seat: aspect-square border border-white/20 flex items-center justify-center text-xs cursor-pointer hover:border-[#D4AF37] transition-all

shadcn_usage: Dialog (for Room detail modals and Gallery lightbox)
Calendar & Popover (for Check-in/Check-out in Booking Bar)

images.alt: Best Western Imperio Hotel Exterior Night
images.usage: Main hero background with parallax effect
About section bento grid main image

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. This is MANDATORY for the luxury feel.
animations.parallax: Framer Motion useTransform to map scrollY to y position of hero background.
animations.reveal: Fade in and slide up (y: 20 -> 0) with opacity 0 -> 1 for text and images as they enter viewport.
animations.hover: Images in masonry gallery and room cards should slightly scale up (scale: 1.05) with extended transition durations (duration-700) and an overlay fade out.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over images has sufficient text-shadow or a dark gradient overlay underneath.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, select triggers, booking seats) MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize a pure dark theme. DO NOT use Shadcn's default Vercel aesthetic. Override radii to 'rounded-none' or max 'rounded-sm' for a sharp, architectural luxury feel.
2. Use the imported Google fonts: Playfair Display for all Headings, Outfit for Body and standard UI text.
3. Build the floating booking bar utilizing Shadcn Popover + Calendar for dates, and Select for guests. Wrap it in a glassmorphism container.
4. For the 2D Floor Booking UI: Create a schematic/grid view of rooms (like a cinema seat selector). Use simple borders, dark background, and gold highlights for selected states.
5. Use Framer Motion for entrance animations and parallax in the hero.
6. For the Masonry Gallery: Create a column-based layout with varying heights. Clicking an image should open it in a Shadcn Dialog (Lightbox).
7. Install and utilize @phosphor-icons/react for thin, elegant icons in the Amenities section.
8. Strictly enforce data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
9. Ensure the Navbar uses glassmorphism and changes background opacity on scroll.
10. Build the Footer with massive typography for the brand name ('BEST WESTERN IMPERIO') and highly organized link columns.
